predicates.name: is_small_company_with_legal_personality
predicates.description: The company is a small company with legal personality.

predicates.name: is_subsidiary_company
predicates.description: The company is a subsidiary company.

predicates.name: is_parent_company
predicates.description: The company is a parent company.

predicates.name: employee_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: The employee criterion is exceeded for the company in the financial year (annual average employees greater than 10).

predicates.name: turnover_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: The turnover criterion is exceeded for the company in the financial year (annual net turnover exclusive of VAT greater than 900,000 euros).

predicates.name: balance_sheet_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: The balance sheet criterion is exceeded for the company in the financial year (balance sheet total greater than 450,000 euros).

predicates.name: more_than_one_micro_company_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: More than one micro-company criterion is exceeded for the company in the financial year.

predicates.name: is_micro_company
predicates.description: The company qualifies as a micro-company in the given financial year.

predicates.name: is_last_closed_financial_year
predicates.description: The financial year is the last closed financial year for the company.

functions.name: annual_average_employees
functions.description: The annual average number of employees of the company in the financial year.

functions.name: annual_net_turnover_excl_vat
functions.description: The annual net turnover exclusive of value added tax of the company in the financial year, in euros.

functions.name: balance_sheet_total
functions.description: The balance sheet total of the company in the financial year, in euros.
